context_text: <A> my youngest daughter went to special ed / <B> really / <A> and she's um she's got cerebral palsy / <B> wow / <A> so she and now you know in michigan you're entitled to an education from birth to twenty five / <B> okay / <A> and she's twenty three now but had i stayed in michigan she would of still been going to the public school system / <B> wow
